message.content:
Fetch and analyze the design/visual style of these two reference websites. Research only, no code changes needed.

1. https://www.zerodrift.ai/
2. https://baselsupercluster.com/

For each site, describe:
- Color palette (background, text, accent colors)
- Typography style (font families, weights, sizes)
- Layout approach (full-width, centered, grid)
- Key design elements (gradients, glassmorphism, dark/light theme, animations)
- Hero section style
- Navigation style
- Overall aesthetic/vibe

Return a detailed design analysis to use as inspiration for a redesign.

content.text: I'll fetch and analyze both websites for you to understand their design and visual styles.

input.prompt: Analyze the design and visual style. Describe: color palette (background, text, accent colors), typography (font families, weights, sizes), layout approach (full-width, centered, grid), key design elements (gradients, glassmorphism, dark/light theme, animations), hero section style, navigation style, and overall aesthetic.

Analyze the design and visual style. Describe: color palette (background, text, accent colors), typography (font families, weights, sizes), layout approach (full-width, centered, grid), key design elements (gradients, glassmorphism, dark/light theme, animations), hero section style, navigation style, and overall aesthetic.

content.content:
Design and Visual Style Analysis for ZeroDrift Website:

Color Palette:
- Predominant colors: Black, white, grayscale (grays from #7D7D7D to #1C1C1E)
- Minimal color accents
- Dark/light neutral aesthetic

Typography:
- Sans-serif font family
- Multiple font weights (400, 500)
- Clean, modern typographic approach
- Emphasis on legibility with font smoothing techniques

Layout:
- Full-width responsive design
- Centered content sections
- Grid-based layout with flexible sections
- Mobile-responsive breakpoints

Key Design Elements:
- Minimal design with strong emphasis on content
- Subtle animations (hover states, scroll interactions)
- Clean iconography
- Logo-driven visual branding
- Marquee-style logo animation
- GSAP ScrollTrigger for interactive elements

Hero Section:
- Large, bold headline
- Image/logo marquee
- Centered content with clear call-to-action

Navigation:
- Sticky top navigation
- Dropdown menus
- Minimalist icon-driven design
- Responsive mobile adaptation

Overall Aesthetic:
- Tech-forward, clean, professional
- Enterprise/B2B software design language
- Emphasizes clarity and simplicity
- Modern, minimalist Silicon Valley design approach
